maths_science.description: You enjoy numbers, logic, problem solving, science subjects
maths_science.message: Your analytical mind is your biggest strength! Careers in tech, medicine, and finance suit you well.

arts_creativity.description: You enjoy drawing, music, writing, design, creative thinking
arts_creativity.message: Creative fields are booming in the digital age! Design, content, and media offer great opportunities.

people_communication.description: You enjoy talking to people, leading teams, resolving issues, public speaking
people_communication.message: Your communication skills are gold! Law, civil services, and leadership roles are perfect for you.

business_money.description: You enjoy understanding markets, money, business strategy, trading
business_money.message: Business and finance is your calling! CA, MBA, and entrepreneurship offer great paths.

helping_others.description: You want to help people, contribute to society, serve the nation
helping_others.message: Your desire to serve is admirable! Medicine, civil services, and defense are noble paths.

technology_gadgets.description: You love computers, gadgets, coding, how things work technically
technology_gadgets.message: You're born for the tech era! Software, AI, and cutting-edge aviation tech await you.
